title: Single-nucleus RNA-sequencing in pre-cellularization Drosophila melanogaster embryos
author: Albright, Ashley
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-zero
description: Using 10x Genomics Single-Cell Gene Expression (v3 chemistry) and the Illumina NovaSeq SP we sequenced RNA in nuclei isolated from control and maternal null CTCF pre-cellularization Drosophila melanogaster embryos.
steps_raw: Using 10x Genomics Single-Cell Gene Expression (v3 chemistry) and the Illumina NovaSeq SP we sequenced RNA in nuclei isolated from control and maternal null CTCF pre-cellularization Drosophila melanogaster embryos.
